The so-called immortal jellyfish can revert from adulthood to a juvenile stage.
Turritopsis dohrnii can transform mature tissues back into a polyp stage, although it can still be killed.
The Post Office Horizon system was robust and branch shortfalls proved subpostmasters stole money
Software errors and disclosure failures led to hundreds of wrongful prosecutions and financial ruin.
British Post Office and Fujitsu-linked evidence
Abraham Lincoln and Charles Darwin were born on the same day.
Germany's destruction of the Herero and Nama was not genocide
Extermination orders, camps, forced labor, and mass death were minimized for more than a century.
German colonial and later official narratives
Mars has a volcano nearly three times Everest's height above sea level.
Olympus Mons rises roughly 22 kilometers above the Martian datum.
Diethylstilbestrol was safe and effective in preventing miscarriage
DES was widely prescribed despite weak efficacy evidence and later cancer and reproductive harms.
Humans have developmental skin patterns called Blaschko's lines that are usually invisible.
Cell lineages create hidden paths that can become visible in certain mosaic skin conditions.
AIDS was created by the U.S. military
A fabricated origin story was planted and amplified internationally to damage U.S. credibility.
Soviet KGB Operation INFEKTION and allied outlets
Australia is wider east to west than the Moon's diameter.
Mainland Australia's span is roughly 4,000 kilometers; the Moon's diameter is about 3,475.
CFCs were not responsible for ozone depletion
Industry disputed atmospheric chemistry before the Montreal Protocol and later evidence confirmed the mechanism.
Welwitschia can live for more than a thousand years while growing only two persistent leaves.
Its two leaves grow from the base throughout the plant's life and split into ribbons.
OxyContin reliably provided twelve-hour pain relief for most patients
Many patients experienced end-of-dose failure, but the claim supported higher doses rather than shorter intervals.
A hand-cranked chain saw was developed for surgery, including childbirth-related bone cutting, before logging chainsaws.
An osteotome with a moving chain was used to cut bone during difficult medical procedures.
Philippine martial law was imposed to stop an imminent communist takeover and restore order
Threats were exaggerated and incidents manipulated to entrench dictatorship, repression, and plunder.
Anne Frank and Martin Luther King Jr. were born in the same year.
Takata airbags were safe despite evidence of explosive inflator ruptures
Testing manipulation and withheld risk information preceded the largest automotive recall in history.
Mars has a canyon system about as long as the continental United States is wide.
Enron was financially healthy and its accounting reflected real profits
Off-balance-sheet entities and manipulated reporting hid debt and losses.
Cells from a fetus can remain in the mother's body for decades.
Fetal microchimeric cells can persist in maternal blood and tissues long after birth.
Russian forces did not kill civilians in Bucha; the scene was staged
Satellite imagery, witness accounts, bodies, and investigations contradicted claims that victims appeared after Russian withdrawal.
Africa is larger than the United States, China, India, and much of Europe combined.
Africa covers about 30.4 million square kilometers, and Mercator maps heavily enlarge high latitudes.
Saddam Hussein's government had an operational partnership with al-Qaeda behind 9/11
Suggestive public messaging fostered a connection unsupported by the 9/11 Commission.
Senior U.S. officials and aligned media
A roughly 2,000-year-old date seed was germinated successfully.
Seeds recovered from archaeological sites produced living Judean date palms.
Chernobyl created no major danger beyond the plant
Authorities delayed disclosure, minimized fallout, and held public events despite radiation.
Early Coca-Cola contained cocaine derived from coca leaves.
The original formula used coca-leaf extract before cocaine was removed.
The Nixon White House had no role in the Watergate cover-up
Tapes and prosecutions established obstruction, hush money, and misuse of government power.
Axolotls can regrow entire limbs and repair parts of the spinal cord, heart, and other tissues.
Axolotls rebuild patterned tissues with unusually limited scarring.
The CIA had no role in the 1953 overthrow of Iran's government
Declassified records confirmed intelligence involvement in propaganda, bribery, and coup planning.
United States and United Kingdom governments
The Ottoman Empire still existed when the Chicago Cubs were already a professional baseball club.
The club dates to the 1870s; the Ottoman sultanate ended in 1922.
The Nazis, not the Soviet NKVD, murdered Polish officers at Katyn
The USSR blamed Germany for an NKVD mass execution and maintained the cover story for decades.
Astronauts can become several centimeters taller in orbit.
Without normal spinal compression, discs expand in microgravity; height returns after landing.
Japanese American incarceration was required by military necessity and widespread espionage
A later federal commission found the policy was driven by racial prejudice, wartime hysteria, and political failure rather than military necessity.
Identical twins do not have identical fingerprints.
Fingerprint ridges are shaped by both genetics and tiny differences in the womb.
France did not systematically torture or disappear people during the Algerian War
Official euphemisms and denials obscured routine torture, extrajudicial killing, and disappearance.
France's longest land border is with Brazil.
French Guiana makes France and Brazil share a border longer than France's border with Spain.
The CIA had no role in the 1954 Guatemalan coup and Árbenz was simply a Soviet puppet
A covert invasion and psychological campaign were hidden while the communist threat was exaggerated.
United States government and CIA information operations
Lotus seeds more than a thousand years old have germinated.
Ancient sacred-lotus seeds retained viable embryos through exceptional protective chemistry.
Agent Orange posed no serious long-term health danger
Risks from dioxin contamination and long-term illness were minimized for years.
Vietnam, United States, and affected regions
The original 7 Up formula contained lithium citrate.
The mood-stabilizing salt remained in the product until 1948.
Mobutu Sese Seko's fortune was legitimately earned
State resources and foreign aid were diverted into personal and patronage wealth.
Some sea slugs can discard the body behind the head and grow a new one.
Elysia sea slugs have been observed self-decapitating and regenerating a body, likely while suppressing parasites.
Suharto did not accumulate vast corrupt wealth
Family monopolies, foundations, and patronage produced one of the world's largest alleged kleptocracies.
The Pony Express operated for only about 18 months.
It ran from April 1860 to October 1861 before the transcontinental telegraph made it obsolete.
Bernard Madoff's investment returns came from a legitimate strategy
Client statements and steady returns were fabricated using new investor money.
The International Space Station sees about 16 sunrises and sunsets each day.
The station circles Earth roughly every 90 minutes.
Chile's dictatorship did not systematically torture or disappear opponents
Truth commissions and prosecutions documented extensive state torture, disappearance, and execution.
Some people are born with their major organs mirrored left-to-right.
In situs inversus, the heart and abdominal organs can be reversed while often functioning normally.
Odebrecht did not run a systematic international bribery department
The company maintained structured off-book systems for bribes across numerous countries.
France spans more time zones than any other country when overseas territories are included.
France uses 12 standard time zones, and 13 during part of the year depending on territorial daylight rules.
Syrian chemical attacks were consistently staged by rebels or foreign intelligence
Multiple OPCW and UN investigations attributed several chemical attacks to Syrian government forces despite denial campaigns.
